imports.name: now_ms
imports.description: Returns the current time in milliseconds since the epoch.

imports.name: log
imports.description: Logs a message to the host's console. The message is a UTF-8 string.

imports.name: request_frame
imports.description: Requests that the host schedule a new frame to be rendered.

imports.name: canvas_size
imports.description: Writes the current canvas dimensions into the provided memory locations (u32).

imports.name: submit_commands
imports.description: Submits a buffer of drawing commands to the host renderer.

imports.name: fetch_start
imports.description: Initiates a network fetch. Returns 0 on success (initiation), or error code.

imports.name: resource_release
imports.description: Releases a host-managed resource by ID.

imports.name: performance_mark
imports.description: Emits a performance mark with the given name.

imports.name: image_decode
imports.description: Requests decoding of image data. Result returned via callback.

exports.name: init
exports.description: Called once by the host to initialize the module.

exports.name: frame
exports.description: Called by the host to render a frame. Time is ms since start.

exports.name: resize
exports.description: Called when the canvas is resized.

exports.name: pointer_move
exports.description: Called on pointer movement. Coords are Q16.16.

exports.name: pointer_down
exports.description: Called on pointer button press. Coords are Q16.16.

exports.name: pointer_up
exports.description: Called on pointer button release. Coords are Q16.16.

exports.name: wheel
exports.description: Called on wheel event. Deltas are Q16.16.

exports.name: key_event
exports.description: Called on keyboard event. 'down' is 1 for press, 0 for release.

exports.name: resource_loaded
exports.description: Called when a resource fetch completes successfully.

exports.name: resource_failed
exports.description: Called when a resource fetch fails.

exports.name: query_feature
exports.description: Queries if a feature is supported.

status_codes.name: INVALID_ARGUMENT
status_codes.meaning: One or more arguments were invalid.

status_codes.name: OUT_OF_MEMORY
status_codes.meaning: Host or guest out of memory.

conventions: All pointers are 32-bit integer offsets into linear memory.
Lengths are 32-bit integers representing byte counts.
Pointers passed from guest to host are valid until the call returns.

calling_conventions.string_encoding: UTF-8 encoded strings passed as (ptr, len) pairs.
struct_layout: Fields aligned to their natural size.
Padding at end to align struct size to largest member alignment.
